name: Key Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add lime rind and juice to the gelatin mixture.
3. Slowly pour into beaten egg yolk while stirring constantly.
4. Add condensed milk and bitters.
5. Chill until slightly thickened.
6. Beat egg white until stiff peaks will form.
7. Fold the egg white into the gelatin mixture.
8. Add green food coloring, if desired.
9. Pour the mixture into a prepared 9-inch pie shell.
10. Chill until firm for about 3 hours.
11. Garnish with lime slices or whipped topping, if desired.
